candidates.title: The Moment Everything Changed
candidates.hook: I immediately thought, who is that?
candidates.summary: A guest recalls the instant a routine setup turned into a life-changing first impression.
candidates.reasonSelected: The clip trims past setup chatter and opens on the emotional jolt, then lands a clean explanation.
candidates.transcriptExcerpt: I hear them start checking vocals, no big deal. And then you start singing, and I immediately was like, who is that?
candidates.suggestedCaption: One ordinary soundcheck changed the whole story.
candidates.openingLine: I hear them start checking vocals, no big deal.
candidates.closingLine: I immediately was like, who is that?

candidates.title: We Didn't Sign Up For This
candidates.hook: As soon as we got married, it got hard.
candidates.summary: A strong relationship clip skips the conversational bridge and starts on the real tension.
candidates.reasonSelected: The opening avoids a soft bridge start and reaches the strongest idea quickly, with a clear payoff about conflict.
candidates.transcriptExcerpt: As soon as we got married, it got hard. The beginning was very blissful. Imagine my shock after we got married, and then all of the conflict came out.
candidates.suggestedCaption: The first conflict can tell you more than the honeymoon phase.
candidates.openingLine: As soon as we got married, it got hard.
candidates.closingLine: I was like, what is this? I didn't sign up for this.

candidates.title: The Question That Finally Got Answered
candidates.hook: Why did the same argument keep coming back?
candidates.summary: A question-answer reel keeps the question and the answer together instead of ending unresolved.
candidates.reasonSelected: The candidate contains the question, tension, and answer in one self-contained span with a clean closing line.
candidates.transcriptExcerpt: Why did the same argument keep coming back? We realized it was never about the dishes. It was about whether either of us felt heard.
candidates.suggestedCaption: Sometimes the argument is just the surface.
candidates.openingLine: Why did the same argument keep coming back?
candidates.closingLine: It was about whether either of us felt heard.

candidates.title: The Client Story That Made The Lesson Obvious
candidates.hook: My client thought the offer was too specific.
candidates.summary: A client-specific business story becomes a useful reel because it has a concrete problem, reversal, and takeaway.
candidates.reasonSelected: The topic is client-specific, but the editorial arc is strong and self-contained, so it should not be rejected by topic.
candidates.transcriptExcerpt: My client thought the offer was too specific. But the specificity was the reason people trusted it, because they could finally see themselves in the problem.
candidates.suggestedCaption: Specific beats generic when the right viewer can recognize themselves.
candidates.openingLine: My client thought the offer was too specific.
candidates.closingLine: They could finally see themselves in the problem.

candidates.title: The Reframe That Makes The Clip Work
candidates.hook: The problem was not that the idea was too personal.
candidates.summary: A mixed-duration candidate captures the strongest reframe without forcing it into a fixed bucket.
candidates.reasonSelected: This is not a duplicate of another bucket; it is a tighter variant that preserves the payoff while cutting extra setup.
candidates.transcriptExcerpt: The problem was not that the idea was too personal. The problem was that we kept hiding the useful part behind safe language.
candidates.suggestedCaption: The useful part is usually the part you are tempted to soften.
candidates.openingLine: The problem was not that the idea was too personal.
candidates.closingLine: We kept hiding the useful part behind safe language.
